title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: This is a branching event with two distinct outcomes. [gold]Nab[/gold] immediately ends the event after adding an [red]Injury[/red] curse to your deck and granting a single random relic. Choosing Nab triggers screen shake and a blunt attack sound effect before the reward is offered. [gold]I Can Take Them[/gold] transitions to a combat encounter where you fight two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] with more generous rewards: both a random relic and a random potion. While the event is active, the two constructs continuously punch each other in the background with attack animations and visual effects. Combat ability to remove potions is temporarily disabled during the event.
